tool.name: OGS: geometryToGmshGeo
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'geometryToGmshGeo'.
tool.command: ## Symlinks für Repeat input #for $item in $input_repeat ln -s '$item.element' '$item.element.element_identifier'; #end for geometryToGmshGeo #for $item in $input_repeat --input '$item.element.element_identifier' #end for $max_points_in_quadtree_leaf: --max_points_in_quadtree_leaf '$max_points_in_quadtree_leaf' $mesh_density_scaling_at_points: --mesh_density_scaling_at_points '$mesh_density_scaling_at_points' $mesh_density_scaling_at_stations: --mesh_density_scaling_at_stations '$mesh_density_scaling_at_stations' $average_point_density: --average_point_density '$average_point_density' $homogeneous --output output_1.geo --write_merged_geometries output_2.gml

param.name: average_point_density
param.label: average point density
param.help: average point density / average edge length as a positive floating point number, (min = 0)

tool.help: This tool runs the **geometryToGmshGeo** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
